title: [Brayern Isle, Docks]
description: The sky and horizon are obscured, both caught in the electric blue haze of the distant mana storm.  The docks here are new, built from polished blue-green wood and still bearing partially unpacked crates from construction.  Beneath, thick circular pilings drive down into bright blue waters that gently lap against an ebon, volcanic stone-laden shore.  Longboats are tied against these pilings, hewn from the same blue-green wood as the docks.  A long bridge over the water leads ashore.
